text:
Name:
Ardi Pratama

Professional Summary:
Software Engineer with experience in backend development, machine learning systems, and automation engineering. Skilled in designing scalable APIs, developing data-driven applications, and building AI-assisted workflows using Python-based technologies. Strong understanding of software architecture, data processing pipelines, and system integration. Passionate about combining backend engineering with applied artificial intelligence to create efficient and production-ready solutions.

Technical Skills:

Programming Languages:
- Python
- C++
- SQL
- JavaScript (Basic)

Backend Development:
- FastAPI
- Flask
- REST API Design
- JWT Authentication
- API Integration
- WebSocket Basics

Machine Learning & AI:
- scikit-learn
- TensorFlow (Basic)
- PyTorch (Basic)
- Feature Engineering
- Model Evaluation
- Embedding Systems
- Vector Search Fundamentals

Data Processing:
- Pandas
- NumPy
- Data Cleaning
- Data Transformation
- CSV / JSON Processing
- Data Visualization Basics

Databases:
- PostgreSQL
- SQLite
- MySQL

DevOps & Tools:
- Git & GitHub
- Linux
- Docker (Basic)
- Virtual Environment Management
- Logging & Monitoring
- CI/CD Fundamentals

Other Technologies:
- OpenCV (Basic)
- Automation Scripting
- OOP & Software Design Principles
- Multithreading Basics

Professional Experience:

Backend Developer Intern
PT Digital Solusi Nusantara
Jan 2024 – Jun 2024

- Developed RESTful APIs using FastAPI for internal company systems
- Designed modular backend architecture for maintainability and scalability
- Implemented JSON-based request/response handling for data processing services
- Optimized API response performance and reduced endpoint latency
- Collaborated with frontend developers for API integration and debugging
- Assisted in database schema design and query optimization
- Added structured logging and error handling mechanisms for backend services

Freelance Software Developer
2023 – Present

- Built custom automation tools for small business operations
- Developed Python-based scripts for data scraping, processing, and reporting
- Created internal dashboards and utility applications for workflow automation
- Integrated third-party APIs for external service communication
- Maintained and improved legacy scripts to increase reliability and efficiency

Projects:

AI Resume Screening System
Personal Project

- Built an AI-powered resume evaluation platform using Python and FastAPI
- Implemented semantic similarity matching between resumes and job requirements
- Developed vector-based retrieval workflow for candidate ranking
- Integrated embedding models and retrieval pipelines for intelligent filtering
- Added configurable scoring logic and structured JSON outputs
- Implemented logging, retry systems, and timeout handling for reliability
- Designed modular architecture for future scalability

Technologies Used:
Python, FastAPI, scikit-learn, NumPy, JSON, Vector Search

Machine Learning Classification System
Personal Project

- Developed a machine learning model for classification tasks using scikit-learn
- Performed feature engineering and preprocessing on structured datasets
- Evaluated model performance using precision, recall, and F1-score
- Compared multiple algorithms to improve prediction accuracy
- Built reusable training and evaluation pipelines

Technologies Used:
Python, scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy

Data Automation Pipeline
Personal Project

- Created automation scripts for data collection and preprocessing
- Processed large CSV and JSON datasets automatically
- Reduced manual processing time through automated workflows
- Implemented file validation and error recovery mechanisms
- Generated summarized reports from processed datasets

Technologies Used:
Python, Pandas, CSV, JSON

Inventory Management API
Academic Project

- Developed backend APIs for inventory and stock management
- Implemented CRUD operations with database integration
- Added authentication and role-based access control
- Designed structured database models for product tracking

Technologies Used:
FastAPI, SQLite, SQLAlchemy

Real-Time Chat Backend
Learning Project

- Built a lightweight real-time messaging backend
- Implemented WebSocket communication for live updates
- Managed session handling and user connection states
- Designed scalable event-driven message flow

Technologies Used:
Python, FastAPI, WebSocket

Education:

Bachelor of Electrical Engineering
Focused on software systems, programming, automation, and computational problem solving.

Certifications:
- Python Programming Certification
- Machine Learning Fundamentals
- Git & Version Control Basics

Additional Information:
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Comfortable working in Linux development environments
- Interested in backend engineering, AI systems, and software architecture
- Fast learner with strong self-learning capability
- Experienced in working on independent technical projects
